positive: A highly stylized celestial watercolor print featuring a bioluminescent forest biome under a crescent moon. The composition is centered and symmetrical, depicting silhouettes of massive, stylized ancient trees forming intricate patterns against a deep indigo and sapphire nebula background. Incorporate glowing geometric mandalas composed of exotic flora (such as crystalline ferns and glowing mushrooms). The overall aesthetic must be high contrast, featuring vibrant electric teal and gold accents against deep midnight blues. Studio quality illustration, clean linework, perfect silhouette visibility, designed for apparel transfer.
